arts.ttl: Juventus Aren’t in Talks to Include Arsenal Target to Keep €70M-Rated PSG Loanee
arts.sum: Juventus secured Randal Kolo Muani on loan until the end of the season during the winter transfer window, and the French forward has made an immediate impact, netting five goals in his first three matches. While Tottenham also showed interest, Kolo Muani chose Juventus for a fresh start after a challenging 18 months at PSG. arts.ttl: Juventus Face €70M Decision to Secure PSG Outcast for FIFA Club World Cup
arts.sum: Juventus secured Randal Kolo Muani on loan until the end of the season during the winter transfer window, and the French forward has wasted no time making an impact, scoring five goals in his first three matches. arts.ttl: Leeds United Cautioned Over €22.5M-Rated Juventus, PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain tapped into the Russian League to sign Matvei Safonov, and the club might be eyeing that region once again to strengthen its squad. Luis Enrique is known for rotating his lineup, making use of a variety of players to keep the team in peak form, especially as the season hits its halfway point.
